description_long: This is a large, freestanding wardrobe with a light wood grain finish and a classic, rectangular silhouette. The front features four doors: two central doors with large, dark glass or mirror panels, and two narrower side doors with solid panels. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle, and the wardrobe has a prominent, slightly overhanging top cornice for added visual interest. The sides and back are plain, with the same light wood texture throughout. The overall design is modern yet functional, suitable for bedrooms, dressing rooms, or even upscale urban entryways.
description: A tall, light wood wardrobe with four doors, two of which have large dark glass or mirror panels and round knob handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing four doors, two with large dark panels and two solid, all with round knob handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat light wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned light wood surface with no handles or panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain light wood panel.
